name: Poached Salmon with Hollandaise Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
1. Obtain four salmon steaks, approximately 1 inch thick. Do not use margarine in this sauce.
2. Prepare the Hollandaise Sauce: Heat water, salt, peppercorns, lemon slices, parsley, sliced onion, and bay leaf to boiling in a 12-inch skillet. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 5 minutes. Place salmon steaks in the skillet, adding water if needed to cover them. Bring back to a boil, then reduce heat. Simmer uncovered for 12-15 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
3. Serve hot or at room temperature. Refrigerate any remaining sauce; reheat gently by stirring in a small amount of hot water before serving.
